technology.title: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
technology.summary: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.

briefing.news_focus: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Owen Flowers 和 Thalha Jubair 兩名青少年因參與對倫敦交通局（TfL）的駭客攻擊而被定罪，此次攻擊造成了巨大的經濟損失。報導指出，這兩名青少年在進行網路攻擊之前，已經被警方知悉多年，顯示出他們的犯罪行為並非首次出現。
briefing.background: 倫敦交通局（TfL）在近年來面臨多起網路安全事件，這些事件不僅影響了其運營效率，也對公共交通系統的信任度造成了損害。隨著數位化進程的加快，交通系統的網路安全問題日益受到關注。警方對青少年犯罪的監控和預防措施在這種背景下顯得尤為重要，尤其是當這些青少年已經有過犯罪紀錄時，如何有效地介入和預防成為一個挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了青少年網路犯罪的風險，特別是當他們的行為在警方的監控下仍能持續進行時。Owen Flowers 和 Thalha Jubair 的案例顯示，儘管他們的行為早已引起注意，但缺乏有效的干預措施可能導致更嚴重的後果。此事件可能促使倫敦交通局和警方重新評估其網路安全策略及青少年犯罪的預防措施，並加強對潛在威脅的監控。此外，社會對於青少年犯罪的理解與應對方式也可能因此受到影響，促進更多關於如何平衡法律與教育的討論。

technology.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
technology.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

briefing.news_focus: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 白宮要求OpenAI延緩其最新模型GPT 5.6的發布，並將其僅限於與特定合作夥伴分享，而非向大眾公開。這一決定源於特朗普政府對於安全問題的擔憂，顯示出對於人工智慧技術潛在風險的重視。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的快速發展，安全性與倫理問題日益受到關注。OpenAI作為領先的AI研究機構，其模型的發布對於市場與社會都可能帶來深遠影響。過去幾年，許多國家與企業開始制定相關政策，以確保AI技術的安全使用，並防範可能的濫用或風險。特朗普政府的介入，反映出美國在科技發展與安全之間的平衡考量，尤其是在AI技術日益普及的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 白宮的要求顯示出政府對於AI技術潛在風險的高度警覺，尤其是在社會與經濟影響尚不明朗的情況下。OpenAI的決策可能會影響其市場競爭力，因為延遲發布可能讓其他競爭者有機會搶佔市場份額。此外，這一動作也可能引發業界對於政府干預科技發展的討論，特別是在如何平衡創新與安全之間的矛盾方面。未來，若其他科技公司也面臨類似的政府要求，可能會進一步影響整個行業的發展方向與速度。

technology.title: WhatsApp still barely makes Meta any money. Can Kunal Shah change that?
technology.summary: This week, Meta named Kunal Shah, founder of Indian fintech CRED, as WhatsApp’s new global head, succeeding Will Cathcart after nearly seven years at the helm

briefing.news_focus: This week, Meta named Kunal Shah, founder of Indian fintech CRED, as WhatsApp’s new global head, succeeding Will Cathcart after nearly seven years at the helm
briefing.news_focus_zh: Meta公司本週宣布任命印度金融科技公司CRED創始人Kunal Shah為WhatsApp的新全球負責人，接替在該職位上任職近七年的Will Cathcart。此舉標誌著Meta在提升WhatsApp盈利能力方面的努力，因為WhatsApp目前的盈利能力仍然有限。
briefing.background: WhatsApp自2014年被Meta收購以來，雖然用戶數量持續增長，但其商業化進程緩慢，尚未為Meta帶來顯著的收入。Meta一直在尋求將WhatsApp轉型為一個更具盈利潛力的平台，特別是在全球數位支付和商業通訊日益增長的背景下。Kunal Shah在金融科技領域的經驗可能為WhatsApp帶來新的商業模式和創新思路，尤其是在推動用戶付費和商業服務方面。
briefing.analysis: Kunal Shah的任命可能會引發WhatsApp在商業化策略上的重大變革。Shah在CRED的成功經驗顯示他擅長於用戶增長和金融服務的整合，這對於提升WhatsApp的盈利能力至關重要。Meta的挑戰在於如何平衡用戶體驗與商業利益，避免過度廣告化影響用戶基礎。不同於過去的管理者，Shah的金融背景可能使他更專注於開發支付功能和企業解決方案，這與Meta希望在WhatsApp上實現的增長目標相符。未來，WhatsApp的商業化進程將受到市場反應和用戶接受度的影響，這將是Meta需要密切關注的焦點。

politics.title: Minister says he ‘won’t be intimidated’ by home secretary as public row escalates
politics.summary: Shabana Mahmood has demanded Mike Tapp be sacked over call for care worker exemption to migration rules UK politics live – latest updates An extraordinary public row between the home secretary, Shabana Mahmood, and one of her junior ministers has escalated after he said he “won’t be intimidated” in response to calls by her for him to be sacked. Mahmood demanded on Thursday that the migration minister, Mike Tapp, should be fired for writing an unauthorised article in the Times calling for overseas care workers to be exempt from controversial changes to the immigration rules. But Keir Starmer has so far not sacked Tapp for apparently breaking the rules around ministerial conduct. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Shabana Mahmood has demanded Mike Tapp be sacked over call for care worker exemption to migration rules UK politics live – latest updates An extraordinary public row between the home secretary, Shabana Mahmood, and one of her junior ministers has escalated after he said he “won’t be intimidated” in response to calls by her for him to be sacked. Mahmood demanded on Thursday that the migration minister, Mike Tapp, should be fired for writing an unauthorised article in the Times calling for overseas care workers to be exempt from controversial changes to the immigration rules. But Keir Starmer has so far not sacked Tapp for apparently breaking the rules around ministerial conduct. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國內政部長Shabana Mahmood要求移民部長Mike Tapp因為在《泰晤士報》上發表未經授權的文章而被解雇，該文章呼籲對海外護理工作者在移民規則變更中提供豁免。Tapp則回應稱不會被威脅，並表示不會辭職。儘管Mahmood的要求引發了公開爭論，但工黨領袖Keir Starmer至今尚未對Tapp採取解雇行動。
briefing.background: 英國目前正面臨移民政策的重大變革，特別是在護理行業。隨著對護理人力資源的需求增加，政府內部對於如何調整移民規則以吸引海外護理工作者的看法出現分歧。Mahmood的立場強調了政府對移民政策的嚴格性，而Tapp的呼籲則反映了對行業需求的關注。這場爭論不僅涉及個人職位的安全，也反映了工黨內部對於移民政策的不同看法。
briefing.analysis: 此次爭論突顯了英國政府內部對於移民政策的緊張局勢。Mahmood的要求顯示出她對於遵守內部規範的重視，並希望強調政府在移民問題上的一致性。然而，Tapp的反應則表明他對於護理行業的需求有不同的看法，並不願意因為內部壓力而妥協。工黨領袖Starmer的沉默可能暗示他在這一問題上的猶豫，面對兩位部長的不同立場，他需要考慮到黨內的團結與選民的需求。未來幾天，這一事件可能會進一步影響工黨的內部動態及其在移民政策上的立場。

politics.title: Child malnutrition in Nepal has reached ‘alarming’ levels since aid cuts, survey finds
politics.summary: Fears hard-won gains in reducing child mortality over 20 years are at risk after end of USAID funding for nutrition programmes Child malnutrition in Nepal has reached “alarming” levels, according to the largest ever survey of under-fives in the country. The new figures came just over a year after USAID, the former US flagship agency closed by the Trump administration in 2025, stopped funding work on child nutrition in Nepal. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Fears hard-won gains in reducing child mortality over 20 years are at risk after end of USAID funding for nutrition programmes Child malnutrition in Nepal has reached “alarming” levels, according to the largest ever survey of under-fives in the country. The new figures came just over a year after USAID, the former US flagship agency closed by the Trump administration in 2025, stopped funding work on child nutrition in Nepal. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 尼泊爾的兒童營養不良問題已達到“驚人”水平，這是根據該國有史以來最大的五歲以下兒童調查結果所顯示的。這一數據出現於美國國際開發署（USAID）於2025年停止對尼泊爾兒童營養計劃的資助後不久，這使得過去20年來在降低兒童死亡率方面所取得的成果面臨風險。
briefing.background: 尼泊爾在過去二十年中，通過各種國際援助計劃，特別是來自USAID的資金，顯著改善了兒童健康狀況，降低了兒童死亡率。然而，隨著USAID的資助結束，許多營養計劃的運作受到影響，導致兒童營養不良問題惡化。根據最新調查，兒童營養不良的比例顯著上升，這對尼泊爾的公共衛生構成了重大挑戰，尤其是在疫情後，經濟復甦緩慢的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 各方利益關係在此事件中顯得尤為重要。尼泊爾政府面臨著如何填補USAID資金缺口的壓力，並可能需要尋求其他國際組織或國家的援助來應對兒童營養不良的危機。此外，非政府組織和社會團體也可能會加大對政府的監督，要求其采取行動以改善兒童健康狀況。隨著兒童營養不良問題的加劇，社會對政府的期待和壓力將會增加，這可能促使政府重新評估其公共衛生政策和資金分配策略。

politics.title: Chinese translation of Tokyo war trial records fill ‘critical gap’: state media
politics.summary: For the first time, the complete court records from the Tokyo Trial have been published in Chinese, offering the public in China a detailed look at Japanese war crimes, according to state media. The translation, which spans 40 volumes, took a team of hundreds more than a decade to produce. It filled “a critical gap in domestic historical records”, state news agency Xinhua reported on Thursday. The International Military Tribunal for the Far East – also known as the Tokyo Trial – lasted from May...

briefing.news_focus: For the first time, the complete court records from the Tokyo Trial have been published in Chinese, offering the public in China a detailed look at Japanese war crimes, according to state media. The translation, which spans 40 volumes, took a team of hundreds more than a decade to produce. It filled “a critical gap in domestic historical records”, state news agency Xinhua reported on Thursday. The International Military Tribunal for the Far East – also known as the Tokyo Trial – lasted from May...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國首次發布完整的東京戰犯審判記錄中文翻譯，這些記錄詳細記載了日本的戰爭罪行。根據國家媒體報導，這項翻譯工作耗時十年以上，涉及數百人的團隊，並填補了中國國內歷史記錄中的一個關鍵空白。這一消息由國家新聞機構新華社於週四報導。
briefing.background: 東京戰犯審判是二戰後對日本戰爭罪行進行審判的重要國際法庭，該審判於1946年至1948年間進行，涉及多名日本軍事及政治領導人。隨著時間推移，對於這段歷史的研究與討論在中國逐漸增多，尤其是在近年來中日關係的背景下，對於歷史問題的認識與解讀成為雙方互動的重要議題。此次翻譯的出版，標誌著中國在戰爭歷史研究方面的一個重要進展，並可能影響公眾對於這段歷史的認識。
briefing.analysis: 此次東京戰犯審判記錄的中文翻譯發布，反映了中國在歷史敘事上的努力，旨在強化國內對於日本戰爭罪行的認識與記憶。這一行動可能會引發不同的反應，尤其是在中日兩國之間的歷史認知上。部分學者可能會支持這一舉措，認為它有助於促進對歷史的全面理解，而另一些人則可能擔心這會加劇兩國間的歷史爭議。此外，這也可能成為中國政府在國內強化民族主義與歷史教育的一部分，進一步影響國內外對於中日關係的看法。

economy.title: Great Britain’s grid operator warns again over power supplies in heatwave
economy.summary: Neso asks generators to provide extra electricity on Friday evening to meet demand from fans and air conditioning Business live – latest updates Great Britain’s energy system operator has raised the alarm over electricity supplies for the second time this week as a heatwave continues to disrupt Europe’s energy markets. The National Energy System Operator (Neso) issued a notice late on Thursday asking generators to provide any extra electricity possible to Friday evening to help meet rising demand as households turn on air conditioners and electric fans to cope with the heat. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Neso asks generators to provide extra electricity on Friday evening to meet demand from fans and air conditioning Business live – latest updates Great Britain’s energy system operator has raised the alarm over electricity supplies for the second time this week as a heatwave continues to disrupt Europe’s energy markets. The National Energy System Operator (Neso) issued a notice late on Thursday asking generators to provide any extra electricity possible to Friday evening to help meet rising demand as households turn on air conditioners and electric fans to cope with the heat. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國的國家能源系統運營商（Neso）再次發出警告，指出在持續的熱浪中，電力供應面臨挑戰。該機構於週四晚間發出通知，要求發電商在週五晚上提供額外的電力，以應對因家庭開啟空調和電風扇而上升的需求。這是本週內第二次發出此類警告，顯示出熱浪對能源市場的影響。
briefing.background: 英國正面臨異常的高溫天氣，這對能源供應造成了壓力。隨著氣溫上升，家庭對電力的需求急劇增加，特別是空調和電風扇的使用量大幅上升。這一情況不僅影響英國，還對整個歐洲的能源市場造成了衝擊，因為多個國家也在應對類似的熱浪問題。Neso作為英國的電網運營商，負責確保電力供應的穩定性，面對這樣的需求挑戰，該機構需要及時調整策略以應對突發情況。
briefing.analysis: Neso的警告反映出英國在極端氣候條件下的能源供應脆弱性。隨著氣候變化導致的極端天氣事件日益頻繁，能源供應商面臨的挑戰也在增加。這一情況可能促使政府和企業加速投資可再生能源和儲能技術，以提高未來的供應彈性。此外，這也可能引發對能源政策的重新評估，特別是在應對氣候變化和保障能源安全方面。各方利益相關者，包括政府、發電商和消費者，將需共同面對這一挑戰，並尋求長期解決方案。

economy.title: Indonesia set to issue US$1 billion in panda bonds in China
economy.summary: Indonesia is expected to start issuing at least US$1 billion in yuan-denominated bonds in China within days or weeks, the Southeast Asian country’s national news agency Antara said on Friday, as part of an effort to stabilise domestic finances and reduce dependence on the US dollar. The Ministry of Finance in Jakarta said the planned issuance of panda bonds – debt securities sold in China’s domestic bond markets – could start before mid-July, pending final signoffs in Beijing, Antara...

briefing.news_focus: Indonesia is expected to start issuing at least US$1 billion in yuan-denominated bonds in China within days or weeks, the Southeast Asian country’s national news agency Antara said on Friday, as part of an effort to stabilise domestic finances and reduce dependence on the US dollar. The Ministry of Finance in Jakarta said the planned issuance of panda bonds – debt securities sold in China’s domestic bond markets – could start before mid-July, pending final signoffs in Beijing, Antara...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 印尼計劃在中國發行至少10億美元的人民幣計價債券，這一舉措旨在穩定國內財政並減少對美元的依賴。根據印尼國家新聞機構Antara的報導，這項發行可能在幾天或幾週內啟動，並預計在七月中之前完成最終簽署。
briefing.background: 印尼的經濟在近年來面臨多重挑戰，包括外部經濟環境的不穩定及對美元的過度依賴。為了應對這些挑戰，印尼政府尋求多元化其融資來源，並提升人民幣的使用率，以減少對美國貨幣的依賴。發行熊貓債券是印尼政府的一項策略，這類債券在中國內部市場發行，能夠吸引中國投資者，並促進雙邊貿易與金融合作。
briefing.analysis: 印尼發行熊貓債券的決策反映出其希望在全球經濟變化中尋求更大的自主權。這一舉措不僅能夠吸引中國資金，還能夠在一定程度上減少對美元的依賴，這在當前全球經濟不確定性加劇的背景下顯得尤為重要。根據參考報導，印尼的製造業發展也可能受到中國經濟政策的影響，這可能會影響印尼未來的經濟策略及其在區域內的競爭力。各方利益關係中，印尼政府希望透過這一發行增強財政穩定性，而中國投資者則可能尋求在印尼市場的投資機會。

supporting_summaries: Does the country’s manufacturing success leave space for anyone else?

economy.title: ‘Kind of miracle solution’: How Paris is harnessing the Seine to replace air-con
economy.summary: City plans to triple system of underground pipes that distribute chilled river water, reducing need for individual cooling units As heatwaves intensify across Europe, most cities are reaching for a familiar fix of more air conditioning. But in 1990s Paris, planning began for a different kind of solution: one of the world’s largest district cooling networks. The system has 120kms (75-miles) of underground pipes distributing chilled water to museums, offices, hospitals, schools and other public buildings including the Louvre, the Grand Palais, and some luxury hotels and office districts. Instead of thousands of individual air-conditioning units, cooling is produced centrally and shared across the city like a utility. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: City plans to triple system of underground pipes that distribute chilled river water, reducing need for individual cooling units As heatwaves intensify across Europe, most cities are reaching for a familiar fix of more air conditioning. But in 1990s Paris, planning began for a different kind of solution: one of the world’s largest district cooling networks. The system has 120kms (75-miles) of underground pipes distributing chilled water to museums, offices, hospitals, schools and other public buildings including the Louvre, the Grand Palais, and some luxury hotels and office districts. Instead of thousands of individual air-conditioning units, cooling is produced centrally and shared across the city like a utility. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 巴黎市計劃擴大其地下冷卻系統，將河流冷卻水的分配管道增加三倍，以應對日益嚴重的熱浪。這一系統自1990年代開始規劃，已經擁有120公里的地下管道，為博物館、辦公室、醫院和學校等公共建築提供冷卻，取代了大量個別空調設備。這種集中式的冷卻方式被視為一種創新的解決方案。
briefing.background: 隨著氣候變化導致的熱浪在歐洲日益頻繁，許多城市選擇增設空調以應對高溫。然而，巴黎的做法卻不同，早在1990年代便開始建設一個大型的區域冷卻網絡。該系統利用塞納河的冷卻水，通過地下管道將冷卻水分配至城市各處，這不僅減少了對個別空調的需求，也降低了能源消耗和碳排放。巴黎的這一創新模式被視為應對氣候變遷的一種可持續解決方案，並且在全球範圍內引起了關注。
briefing.analysis: 巴黎的區域冷卻系統展示了城市在應對氣候變遷方面的前瞻性思維，這一系統的擴展將進一步減少城市的能源需求和碳排放，並可能成為其他城市的借鑒。然而，這種集中式冷卻系統的成功實施仍需克服一些挑戰，包括基礎設施的投資、維護和技術創新。此外，隨著熱浪的加劇，其他城市可能會面臨類似的壓力，迫使他們重新考慮傳統的空調解決方案。參考報導未提供與此事件直接相關的細節，因此未能補充其他觀點。
